source_pr.title: executor, infoschema, planner: optimize query cluster_slow_query
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #20236  

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed:
Add time for primary index in `cluster_slow_queyry` table, and use order maters when parsing the slow log files.
How it Works:
We can use index to accelerate the query and avoid using TopN executor

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- executor, infoschema, planner: optimize query cluster_slow_query

symptoms: sql: "select time from %s where time > '2020-02-17 12:00:05.000000' and time < '2020-05-14 20:00:00.000000' order by time desc", (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: sql: "select time from %s where time > '2020-02-17 12:00:05.000000' and time < '2020-05-14 20:00:00.000000' order by time desc", (executor/executor_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: sql: "select time from %s where time > '2020-02-17 12:00:05.000000' and time < '2020-05-14 20:00:00.000000' order by time desc", (executor/executor_test.go).
fix_pattern: sql: "select time from %s where time > '2020-02-17 12:00:05.000000' and time < '2020-05-14 20:00:00.000000' order by time desc", (executor/executor_test.go)

evidence: evidence: sql: "select time from %s where time > '2020-02-17 12:00:05.000000' and time < '2020-05-14 20:00:00.000000' order by time desc", (executor/executor_test.go)

files: executor/coprocessor.go, executor/executor_test.go, executor/infoschema_reader_test.go, executor/slow_query.go, executor/slow_query_test.go, infoschema/tables.go, planner/core/find_best_task.go, planner/core/memtable_predicate_extractor.go, planner/core/pb_to_plan.go, planner/core/point_get_plan.go
